win_condition: Villagers win by eliminating all Werewolves; Werewolves win when they equal or outnumber Villagers
message: Ultimate Werewolf has no VP. The Village team wins by eliminating all Werewolves. The Werewolf team wins when the number of Werewolves equals or exceeds the number of non-Werewolves. The Tanner (if in play) wins only if voted out during the day.
